arts.ttl: Champions League final group games: join us for updates on all 18 matches – live
arts.sum: Updates from a tantalising final round of games Manchester City v Club Brugge – live updates Live scoreboard | Who needs what | Email Scott Welcome to chaos. There are 36 clubs playing 18 fixtures to determine which eight qualify automatically for the Round of 16 and which 16 go into the play-off round. Here are those fixtures … Aston Villa v Celtic Barcelona v Atalanta Bayer Leverkusen v Sparta Prague Bayern Munich v Slovan Bratislava Borussia Dortmund v Shakhtar Donetsk Brest v Real Madrid Dinamo Zagreb v AC Milan Girona v Arsenal Internazionale v Monaco Juventus v Benfica Lille v Feyenoord Manchester City v Club Brugge PSV v Liverpool Red Bull Salzburg v Atletico Madrid Sporting v Bologna Sturm Graz v RB Leipzig Stuttgart v Paris Saint-Germain Young Boys v Red Star Belgrade Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Jorrel Hato reveals transfer plans amid Liverpool and Chelsea links
arts.sum: Jorrel Hato reveals transfer plans amid Liverpool and Chelsea links Transfer market expert Rudy Galetti confirmed Liverpool's interest in Hato last weekend and reported that Ajax wanted at least €30 million for the versatile defender.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's finishing is 'on another level' - Slot and Lineker talk goals
arts.sum: Gary Lineker sits down with Liverpool manager Arne Slot to discuss his first season in England, similarities between Liverpool and Feyenoord and his expectations for the season.

arts.ttl: Napoli Identify PSV Star as an Alternative Target
arts.sum: Napoli received bad news about Karim Adeyemi and aren’t making progress for Alejandro Garnacho, so they are turning their attention to other wingers like PSV’s Noa Lang. The Dutch team is resisting for now, while the player is open to the move. The post Napoli Identify PSV Star as an Alternative Target appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
